text.inkscape:label: Approved Text
text.tspan: APPROVED
NEVER view the sun without eclipse glasses to avoid permanent eye injury.
Discard damaged or separated filters. Put on glasses before looking at the
sun and remove them after. Limit continuous use to 3 minutes at a time.
Supervise minors using eclipse glasses.
Clean ONLY with a soft cloth or tissue and
store safely. Discard glasses after 10 years.

text.inkscape:label: Instructions Heading
text.tspan: Safety Instructions:
COMPLIANT

text.inkscape:label: ISO Text
text.tspan: Solar filters conform to and meet
ISO 12312-2:2015(E); Filters for Direct
Observation of theSun.

text.inkscape:label: Manufacturer n Conformity
text.tspan: Conforms to and Meets the Transmittance Requirements of ISO 12312-2:2015,
Filters for Direct Observation Of The Sun
In compliance with EU PPE Regulations 2016/425.
Manufactured by SIA GRAVITIS ENTERPRISE LIMITED
Cēsu nov., Cēsis, Lauku iela 7 - 4, LV-4101
Registration No.: 40203564227
